---
title: "Research on Drunk Driving"
format:
  html:
    grid:
      margin-width: 380px
      body-width: 780px
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
---

<style>
.quarto-title-block {
  display: none;
}
.project-block {
  padding: 1.5rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
}

.project-title {
  margin-top: 0;
}

.section-header {
  margin-top: 3rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

img {
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}
</style>





## Drunk Driving Surveillance Dashboard

::: {.project-block}
::: {.grid .align-items-center}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

**Overview:**  
The Drunk Driving Surveillance Dashboard is a publicly available tool designed to monitor alcohol-related crashes in El Paso. It includes over 30 indicators covering crash trends, geographic patterns, and driver and vehicle characteristics. The dashboard is updated monthly, enabling near real-time monitoring of impaired driving in the city.

<br>

<a href="crash_dashboard.html" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">
View Dashboard
</a>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

![](screenshot of dashboard.jpg)

:::
:::
:::

---

## Working Papers & Reports

---

### Does Public Shaming Deter Drunk Driving?

::: {.project-block}
::: {.grid .align-items-center}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

**Summary:**  
This study evaluates the impact of a social media campaign in El Paso that publicly shared booking photos of individuals arrested for driving while intoxicated (DWI). Using time-series analysis, this study attempts to isolate the campaign’s effect on alcohol-related crashes.

The findings highlight the potential and implications of social-media deterrence strategies. Recommendations for improving the strategy are provided.

<br>

<a href="dwi_friday_study.html" class="btn btn-primary">
Read Paper
</a>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

![](dwi_study.jpg)

:::
:::
:::

---

## In the Media

::: {.project-block}
::: {.grid .align-items-center}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

**Opinion Article:**  
This article explores why arrest data can be misleading when trying to understand drunk driving trends, and why researchers often rely on alcohol-involved crash rates instead. This article also includes a graph comparing the rate of alcohol-involved crashes in El Paso to other Texas cities.

<br>

<a href="https://elpasomatters.org/2026/02/25/opinion-why-el-paso-needs-better-data-to-solve-drunk-driving-problem/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">
Read Article
</a>

<br>

**Latest News on DWI in El Paso:**  
This page tracks the latest developments on drunk driving in El Paso. It brings together recent reporting on crashes, arrests, enforcement activity, and policy changes so you can quickly see what’s happening across the city.

<br>

<a href="dwi_news.html" target="_blank" class="btn btn-primary">
View Latest News
</a>



:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

![](opinion_article.jpg)

:::
:::
:::
